tasks.title: Validate run_shell input
tasks.validation_command:
python3 -c '
import asyncio
from pathlib import Path
from src.poor_code.domain.harness.nodes.execution import run_shell

async def test_validation():
    cwd = Path(".")
    cancel = asyncio.Event()
    
    # Case 1: Empty string
    try:
        await run_shell("", cwd, cancel)
        print("FAIL: Empty string did not raise ValueError")
        exit(1)
    except ValueError:
        pass
    
    # Case 2: Whitespace only
    try:
        await run_shell("   \n\t  ", cwd, cancel)
        print("FAIL: Whitespace string did not raise ValueError")
        exit(1)
    except ValueError:
        pass
    
    # Case 3: Valid command (Anti-gaming: use a dynamic command not in reqs)
    # We use "echo" because it is standard and safe.
    test_val = "acceptance_test_123"
    cmd = f"echo {test_val}"
    code, out = await run_shell(cmd, cwd, cancel)
    if code != 0 or out.strip() != test_val:
        print(f"FAIL: Valid command failed. Code: {code}, Out: {out}")
        exit(1)
    
    print("PASS")

asyncio.run(test_validation())
'
tasks.validation_output: all known-green checks still pass; 1/1 acceptance checks green
